creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
Created attachment 244395
portstree patch for update to 6.18.13

Upstream changes since last port version 6.18.12:

- not doing python2 tests any more
- #169 failure to recover corrupt message
- #168 LookupError: unknown encoding: unicode
- #167 lint python code with ruff
- #166 help about write access to oauth2 token file
- bring getmail and getmails rc file filtering in sync
- #160 Enable overriding the prompt parameter in the XOAUTH URL
- #158 Ignore directories in getmailrcdir
